use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers with feature comparison
Show pricing plans with included/excluded features
Present SaaS pricing options with CTA buttons
Display product pricing with plan recommendations
ai_summary: A flexible pricing card component that displays subscription tiers with plan names, prices, feature lists, and call-to-action buttons. Supports multiple color tones (indigo, blue, emerald, zinc) and visual variants (outline, elevated, soft) for customization. Designed for SaaS and subscription-based products to showcase pricing plans with clear feature inclusion/exclusion indicators.
